nasb.text: When Gideon heard the account of the dream and its interpretation, he bowed in worship. He returned to the camp of Israel and said, “Arise, for the Lord has given the camp of Midian into your hands.”

esv.text: As soon as Gideon heard the telling of the dream and its interpretation, he worshiped. And he returned to the camp of Israel and said, “Arise, for the Lord has given the host of Midian into your hand.”

cnv.text: 基甸聽見了這夢的敘述和夢的講解，就敬拜　神；然後返回以色列營中，說：“起來，因為耶和華已經把米甸的軍隊交在你們手裡了。”

ccb.text: 基甸听了这梦和梦的解释，就俯伏敬拜上帝。他回到以色列人的营中，大声喊道：“起来吧，耶和华已经把米甸军营交在你们手中了。”
